MOONSTONE “Why Moonstone?” is usually the first thing people ask me when I tell them the name of my business. Anybody who knows me knows that I like unusual things. I gravitate toward unique forms of art, music, names, food, and people just to name a few. However, the most simple and honest answer to this question is that the Moonstone represents “New Beginnings”. It is a symbol of inner growth and strength, providing calmness and emotional stability while enhancing intuition, promoting inspiration, creativity, success, and good fortune. Possessing these attributes is a goal I continuously strive to accomplish in this lifetime. Be a better person. Help those in need. Make a positive difference in the world one haircut at a time. So, Moonstone is MY new beginning For over 27 years, I proudly worked as a senior stylist for Bogart Salon in Washington DC It was an amazing experience and I got to work with some of the best of the best in the beauty industry. For that opportunity I will be forever grateful. Bogart set me on the path to become the confident and creative stylist that I am today and they provided me with so many opportunities for continued education that I would have otherwise been hard pressed to afford back in my 20’s and 30’s. Her approach is guided by skin-first principles, ensuring every service respects the integrity of the skin while delivering results that are built over time. Rather than quick clean-ups or one-size-fits-all techniques, her work is rooted in consultation, structure, and long-term brow development. profiles.bio: I Love working with skin. Most of us in Colorado fight with dehydration, brown spots and aging. I find with good skin care products and knowing what your skin needs with the climate changes we have you can be on top of your game. Proper nutrition and keeping hydrated is a large part of overall picture. Makeup is another key to help our skin by blocking a lot of the pollution in the air. I work with Dr. Robert Fromcheck M. He administers the injectables such as Botox and juvederm. Makeup artist for those of you that want a hint of beauty added to your life. I will also teach you how to use the makeup you already have on hand. I have been an owner for over 20 years and working inside sola salon for 13 years. Time flies when you do what you love, helping others find their sweet spot. I am also a certified eye lash stylist with Xtreme lashes. My web site is located below! I offer V.I.P hours -- please inquire for those days and times.

Welcome to Lexi Elizabeth Hair Artistry! My name is Lexi, and I have been a stylist in Cherry Creek for 16 years. I'm the Plastic Surgeon For Your Hair! I love making people feel good about themselves from the inside out. The confidence my clients gain from a new cut and color is my true passion! Creating relationships with my clients, connecting with their wants and needs, while sharing in their personal journey is the reason I chose to become a hairdresser! My outstanding credentials incorporate 18 years experience with education from L’Oreal, Schwarzkoph, and Jack Winn color. I continually attend educational classes and keep up to date with the latest color and cutting styles and techniques. My specialty is color correction and I will exceed your expectations. I am certified through Brazilian Blowout and an expert in blowouts and straightening for curly and ethnic hair. Within the last 18 years in the field, I have been inspired by many leaders and icons in the hair industry, all the while sharing my passion for hair with my fellow stylists and clients. I have highly developed skills in cutting, color, and texturizing services, and have been featured in Confetti magazine for my bridal styles. I have had the amazing opportunity to style hair for Channel 7 anchors in the Denver area, as well as CNN correspondent Ana Cabrera. I am passionate about donating my talent to many charities including Locks of Love, and haircuts for the homeless at the Gathering Place in Denve
